fields.name: Annual harvest summary for a specific year by supply
fields.description: Annual harvest summary for a specific year by supply
fields.base_sql:
-- summary table for annual harvest for a specific year by objectives
SELECT
  allOP.supplyarea
, allOP.block
, allOP.compartment
, allOP.opyear
, allOP.objective
, allOP.target_ba_m2ha
, allOP.resid_ba_m2ha
, ROUND(SUM(allOP.netarea)::numeric, 0) AS "NetArea(ha)"
--, allOP.geom
	FROM
(
  SELECT 
    cmpt.region
  , cmpt.district
  , cmpt.supply AS "supplyarea"
  , cmpt.block
  , cmpt.compartment
  , ply.name AS "feaid"
  , ROUND(ply.area_ha::numeric, 1) AS AREA_HA
  , cht.obj_code AS "objective"
  , DATE_PART('year', cht.op_date) AS "opyear"
  , DATE_PART('year', cht.regen_date) AS "regyear"
  --, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cht.op_date) AS "opyear"
  --, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cht.regen_date) AS regyear
  , cht.species AS "apispecies"
  , cht.resid_ba_m2ha
  , cht.target_ba_m2ha
  , cht.resid_spha
  , cht.target_spha
  , cht.pct_area
  , ROUND((ply.area_ha::numeric * cht.pct_area / 100), 1) AS "netarea"
  , obj.description
  --, ply.geom
  FROM silrec.compartments cmpt
  INNER JOIN silrec.polygon ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment
  INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp obj ON cht.obj_code = obj.obj_code
  {where_clause}
) AS allOP

--WHERE allOP.supplyarea IN ('GREENBUSHES', 'MORNINGTON')
--  AND allOP.opyear IN (2002,2003)
GROUP BY
  allOP.supplyarea
, allOP.block
, allOP.compartment
, allOP.opyear
, allOP.objective
, allOP.target_ba_m2ha
, allOP.resid_ba_m2ha
--, allOP.geom
ORDER BY allOP.block, allOP.compartment, allOP.opyear, allOP.objective

where_clauses.label: Select Year(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM op_date) FROM silrec.cohort WHERE op_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC

where_clauses.label: Select Supply(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT supply FROM silrec.compartments WHERE supply is NOT NULL AND supply != '' ORDER BY supply

fields.name: Annual harvest summary for a specific year by block & objectives
fields.description: Annual harvest summary for a specific year by block & objectives
fields.base_sql:
-- summary table for a specific year by objectives
SELECT
-- allop.region,
-- allop.district,
-- 
allop.supplyarea,
allop.block,
-- allop.compartment,
allop.opyear,
allop.objective,
-- allop.apispecies,
-- allop.target_ba_m2ha,
ROUND(sum(allop.netarea)::numeric,0) as "netarea(ha)"
-- allop.*
FROM
(
  SELECT cmpt.region,
  cmpt.district,
  cmpt.supply as "supplyarea",
  cmpt.block,
  cmpt.compartment,
  ply.name AS "feaid",
  ROUND(ply.area_ha::numeric,1) AS area_ha,
  cht.obj_code AS "objective",
  date_part('year', cht.op_date) AS "opyear",
  date_part('year', cht.regen_date) AS "regyear",
  cht.species AS "apispecies",
  cht.resid_ba_m2ha,
  cht.target_ba_m2ha,
  cht.resid_spha,
  cht.target_spha,
  cht.pct_area,
  ROUND((ply.area_ha * cht.pct_area/100)::numeric,1) AS "netarea",
  obj.description
  FROM silrec.compartments cmpt
  INNER JOIN silrec.polygon ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment
  INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp obj ON cht.obj_code = obj.obj_code
) as allop
{where_clause}
--WHERE
--allOP.supplyarea = 'GREENBUSHES'
--AND
--allOP.opyear = 2022
group by
-- allop.region, allop.district,
allop.supplyarea, allop.block
-- , allop.compartment
, allop.opyear, allop.objective
-- order by allop.region, allop.district, allOop.block, allop.compartment, allop.opyear, allop.objective

where_clauses.label: Select Supply(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT supply FROM silrec.compartments where supply is not NULL AND supply != '' ORDER BY supply

fields.name: Annual harvest summary for a specific year
fields.description: Annual harvest summary for a specific year
fields.base_sql:
-- summary table for annual harvest for a specific year by objectives
SELECT
-- allOP.region
-- , allOP.district
-- ,
allOP.supplyarea
, allOP.block
, allOP.compartment
, allOP.opyear
, allOP.objective
-- , allOP.apispecies
, allOP.target_ba_m2ha
, allOP.resid_ba_m2ha
, ROUND(sum(allOP.netarea)::numeric,0) as "NetArea(ha)"
-- allOP.*
FROM
(
  SELECT cmpt.region
  , cmpt.district
  , cmpt.supply as "supplyarea"
  , cmpt.block
  , cmpt.compartment
  , ply.name AS "feaid"
  , ROUND(ply.area_ha::numeric,1) AS AREA_HA
  , cht.obj_code AS "objective"
  , date_part('year', cht.op_date) AS "opyear"
  , date_part('year', cht.regen_date) AS "regyear"
  , cht.species AS "apispecies"
  , cht.resid_ba_m2ha
  , cht.target_ba_m2ha
  , cht.resid_spha
  , cht.target_spha
  , cht.pct_area
  , ROUND((ply.area_ha * cht.pct_area/100)::numeric,1) AS "netarea"
  , obj.description
  
  FROM silrec.compartments cmpt
  INNER JOIN silrec.polygon ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment
  INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp obj ON cht.obj_code = obj.obj_code
) as allOP
{where_clause}
--WHERE
--allOP.opyear = 2022
group by
-- allOP.region, allOP.district,
allOP.supplyarea, allOP.block, allOP.compartment, allOP.opyear, allOP.objective , allOP.target_ba_m2ha, allOP.resid_ba_m2ha
order by allOP.block, allOP.compartment, allOP.opyear, allOP.objective

fields.name: Report for all coupes with treatment
fields.description: Report for all coupes with treatment
fields.base_sql:
-- list all tasks/treatments for cohorts 
SELECT  cmpt.region 
, cmpt.district 
, cmpt.supply as "supplyarea" 
, cmpt.block 
, cmpt.compartment  
, ply.name AS "feaid" 
, ROUND(ply.area_ha::numeric,1) AS AREA_HA		 
, cht.obj_code AS "objective" 
, date_part('year', cht.op_date) AS "opyear" 
, date_part('year', cht.regen_date) AS "regyear" 
, cht.species AS "apispecies" 
, cht.resid_ba_m2ha 
, cht.target_ba_m2ha 
, cht.resid_spha 
, cht.target_spha 
, cht.pct_area 
, ROUND((ply.area_ha * cht.pct_area/100)::numeric,1) AS "netobjarea" 
, obj.description 
, tr.task 
, tr.pct_area as "treatments_pct_area" 
, ROUND((ply.area_ha * cht.pct_area/100 * tr.pct_area/100)::numeric,1) AS "nettreatarea" 
, tr.plan_yr 
, tr.complete_date 
, tr.status 
, tlk.task_name 
FROM silrec.compartments cmpt 
INNER JOIN silrec.polygon  ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment 
INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id 
INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON  asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id 
INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp obj ON cht.obj_code = obj.obj_code 
INNER JOIN silrec.treatment tr on cht.cohort_id = tr.cohort_id 
INNER JOIN silrec.task_lkp tlk on tlk.task = tr.task
{where_clause} 
--WHERE 
-- cmpt.supply = 'GREENBUSHES' 
-- AND  
-- date_part('year', cht.op_date) = 2022 
ORDER BY cmpt.compartment, ply.name

where_clauses.label: Select Year
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM op_date) FROM silrec.cohort WHERE op_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC

where_clauses.label: Select Supply(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT supply FROM silrec.compartments WHERE supply is NOT NULL AND supply != '' ORDER BY supply

fields.name: Report completed tasks summary for a specific year
fields.description: Report completed tasks summary for a specific year
fields.base_sql:
SELECT 
  allOP.task_name AS "Task",
  allOP.task AS "Task code",
  ROUND(SUM(allOP.nettreatarea)::numeric, 0) AS "Net_Task_Area(ha)",
  DATE_PART('year', allOP.complete_date) AS "Year"
FROM (
  SELECT 
    cmpt.region,
    cmpt.district,
    cmpt.supply AS "supplyarea",
    cmpt.block,
    cmpt.compartment,
    ply.name AS "feaid",
    ROUND(ply.area_ha::numeric, 1) AS AREA_HA,
    cht.obj_code AS "objective",
    DATE_PART('year', cht.op_date) AS "opyear",
    DATE_PART('year', cht.regen_date) AS "regyear",
    cht.species AS "apispecies",
    cht.resid_ba_m2ha,
    cht.target_ba_m2ha,
    cht.resid_spha,
    cht.target_spha,
    cht.pct_area,
    ROUND((ply.area_ha::numeric * cht.pct_area / 100), 1) AS "netobjarea",
    obj.description,
    tr.task,
    tr.pct_area AS "treatments_pct_area",
    ROUND((ply.area_ha::numeric * cht.pct_area / 100 * tr.pct_area / 100), 1) AS "nettreatarea",
    tr.plan_yr,
    tr.complete_date,
    tr.status,
    tlk.task_name
  FROM silrec.compartments cmpt
  INNER JOIN silrec.polygon ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment
  INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp obj ON cht.obj_code = obj.obj_code
  INNER JOIN silrec.treatment tr ON cht.cohort_id = tr.cohort_id
  INNER JOIN silrec.task_lkp tlk ON tlk.task = tr.task
) AS allOP
{where_clause}
--WHERE DATE_PART('year', allOP.complete_date) IN (2002)
GROUP BY
  allOP.task,
  allOP.task_name,
  DATE_PART('year', allOP.complete_date)
ORDER BY allOP.task

fields.name: Report for Compartment/Objective by Net Area
fields.description: Report for Compartment/Objective by Net Area
fields.base_sql:
SELECT pinfo.region, pinfo.district, pinfo.compartment 
, pinfo.opyear 
, pinfo.objective 
, pinfo.netarea
--, sum(pinfo.netarea) 
FROM  
( 
  SELECT silrec.compartments.region 
  , silrec.compartments.district 
  , silrec.compartments.block 
  , silrec.compartments.compartment  
  , silrec.polygon.name AS "FEAID" 
  , silrec.cohort.obj_code AS "objective" 
  , date_part('year', silrec.cohort.op_date) AS "opyear" 
  , silrec.cohort.species AS "APISpecies" 
  , silrec.polygon.area_ha * silrec.cohort.pct_area/100 AS "netarea" 
  , silrec.cohort.regen_date 
  , silrec.objective_lkp.description 
  , silrec.objective_category.category_value 
  FROM silrec.compartments 
  INNER JOIN silrec.polygon  ON 
   silrec.compartments.compartment = silrec.polygon.compartment 
  INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply ON 
  silrec.polygon.polygon_id = silrec.assign_cht_to_ply.polygon_id 
  INNER JOIN silrec.cohort ON 
  silrec.assign_cht_to_ply.cohort_id = silrec.cohort.cohort_id 
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_lkp ON 
  silrec.cohort.obj_code = silrec.objective_lkp.obj_code 
  INNER JOIN silrec.objective_category ON 
  Silrec.objective_lkp.obj_code = silrec.objective_category.objective 
 ) AS pinfo 
{where_clause}
--WHERE pinfo.opyear = 2020 
-- GROUP BY  
-- pinfo.region, pinfo.district, pinfo.compartment, pinfo.opyear, pinfo.objective

where_clauses.label: Select Year
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM op_date) FROM silrec.cohort WHERE op_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC

fields.name: Shapefile by year and  by supply
fields.description: Shapefile by year and  by supply
fields.base_sql:
SELECT 
    cmpt.region, 
    cmpt.district,
    cmpt.compartment,
    cmpt.supply,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ply.polygon_id) as polygon_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cht.cohort_id) as cohort_count,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cht.op_date) as operation_year,
    ply.geom
FROM silrec.compartments cmpt
INNER JOIN silrec.polygon ply ON cmpt.compartment = ply.compartment
INNER JOIN silrec.assign_cht_to_ply asgply ON ply.polygon_id = asgply.polygon_id
INNER JOIN silrec.cohort cht ON asgply.cohort_id = cht.cohort_id
{where_clause}
--WHERE
--cmpt.supply = 'GREENBUSHES'
--AND
--date_part('year', cht.op_date) = 2022;
GROUP BY cmpt.region, cmpt.district, cmpt.compartment, cmpt.supply, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cht.op_date), ply.geom

where_clauses.label: Select Year(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM op_date) FROM silrec.cohort WHERE op_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC

where_clauses.label: Select Supply(s)
where_clauses.options_query: SELECT DISTINCT supply FROM silrec.compartments WHERE supply is NOT NULL AND supply != '' ORDER BY supply
